title: Per-service metadata
description: services/<name>/service.yaml — operational metadata for a single service

deployable.description: true if this service is deployed via GitOps (.deploy + compose.yml)

managed_by.description: homelab: GitOps-managed; external: source built from external repo; manual: provisioned by hand; deprecated: no longer active

build.description: Source clone/build required before Docker build (external repo dependency)

compose_path.description: Relative path to compose file; required when deployable: true

secrets.description: none: no secrets; env: plaintext .env at runtime; sops: .env.sops encrypted at rest

healthcheck.description: Public URL for health verification, or null if not publicly reachable

risk_level.description: low: stateless/recoverable; medium: stateful but restorable; high: data-bearing or critical infra; manual-only: never auto-deploy

data_paths.description: Host-side paths with persistent data (volumes that survive container restart)

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for README tables; only needed when the service key formats poorly
